events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: clearance to wall/other units below mfr minimum. This is non-compliant with manufacturer requirements and IMC/IRC M1401 which requires equipment installation per manufacturer's instructions. Work is rough-complete. Decision should be fail.
